All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

R

reset() - Method in class com.example.fasttype.model.GameState
Resets the entire game back to its initial state (level 1, full time).
reset() - Method in interface com.example.fasttype.model.Resettable
Reset the implementing object to its initial state
resetGame() - Method in class com.example.fasttype.model.GameState
Convenience alias for GameState.reset().
Resettable - Interface in com.example.fasttype.model
Defines a contract for objects that can be reset to their initial state.
resetUI() - Method in class com.example.fasttype.controller.GameController
Resets all UI components to their initial state for a new game.
resetUI() - Method in interface com.example.fasttype.view.GameView
Resets all UI components to their initial state for a new game.
